$schema_note: Stage-3 orchestration dial. Read by .github/workflows/orchestrate.yml. Flipping `mode` switches Stage 1/2/3. SAFE DEFAULT: manual = no autonomous runs. See docs/decisions/0002-stage3-autonomy-model.md.

autonomy._doc: Per risk tier, who may merge a green PR. 'auto-on-green' = may auto-merge when every gate passes. 'human' = always human-merged (the credibility moat — never spent for convenience).

sentinels._doc: Scheduled self-audit agents that file issues (never build/merge). Enable per the ADR rollout. 'files' = label they apply to the issue they open.

feedback._doc: Lightweight routing of raw website feedback (issues labeled `feedback`) into the queue: assign an agent:<domain> owner + `triage-queued` marker. Deep validity triage (verbatim files) stays the LLM feedback-triage agent's job; this never judges, promotes, or closes.

decision._doc: The Decide step. Ranks open `proposal` issues by transparent heuristics (security/honesty highest, + engagement + staleness) into a single in-place 'Decision digest' issue and recommends the next promotion. Never promotes or merges — a human decides.

outcome._doc: The Act+Outcome loop. `npm run metrics` computes metrics/latest.json (offline, runnable now); the `retro` agent turns merges+metrics into docs/INSIGHTS.md lessons. Cadence applies in scheduled/event-driven mode.
